channel.title: Posts on The Diary of a dreamer
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Diary of a dreamer

item.title: Introduction to Groovy
item.description: Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static. types are inferred based on the variable values type Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static. types are inferred based on the variable values type Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static.
